name: Cranberry-Ginger Relish
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Finely chopped peeled fresh Ginger
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a heavy, large saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat, stirring until sugar dissolves.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer until relish is thick, stirring often and mashing berries slightly for about 15 minutes.
4. Transfer relish to a small bowl.
5. Cover and chill.
6. Can be prepared up to 1 month ahead. Keep chilled.
